frontmatter.title: Operating System Notes: Two Methods of Multiprocessor Scheduling
frontmatter.summary: An introduction to two methods of multiprocessor scheduling is given: symmetric multiprocessing and asymmetric multiprocessing.

frontMatter.title: Some Basic Bash-Script Code Block
frontMatter.summary: Some basic bash-script code example. It might be help if writing some temporary work-scripts.

frontMatter.title: Resource Lock in Concurrency
frontMatter.summary: Analysis and usage scenarios of spin lock, optimistic lock, pessimistic lock, read-write lock, mutex lock and other concepts.
